sections.paragraph: f. Exo 9:32 Isai. 28:25 , pl. כֻּמְּמִים Eze 4:9 a kind of corn, like wheat, having the beard as if shorn off, far, adoreum, spelt, (triticum spelta, Linn.), Gr. ζέα, ὀλυρά, Germ. Spelt, Dinkel, Arab. كِرْسَنَةُ, which is the same word as the Hebrew (m and n being interchanged, and r inserted). See my Comment. on Isaiah, loc. cit.
